name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.AnimPoseHelper.ConnectedRightFoot
summary: Is the right foot constrained to the world/ an object: -2=do not set in animpose (e.g. let the balancer decide),-1=auto decide by impact info, 0=no, 1=part fully constrained (not implemented:, 2=part point constraint, 3=line constraint).
remarks:
Default value = -2.
            Min value = -2.
            Max value = 2.
